name: employment-hero-readonly
description: Read-only Employment Hero access for Claude Desktop: aggregate, PII-minimising HR figures for care directors.
long_description: Connects Claude to your Employment Hero account, read-only. After installing, ask Claude to "connect Employment Hero" once to approve access in your browser, then ask for organisation, team, and work-location lists and headcount. No write access, and no individual employee fields (names, contact details, pay) are ever returned.

tools.name: connect_employment_hero
tools.description: One-time browser sign-in to Employment Hero.

tools.name: connection_status
tools.description: Report whether Employment Hero is connected.

tools.name: list_work_locations
tools.description: List work locations in an organisation.

tools.name: employee_count
tools.description: Total employee count for an organisation.

client_id.title: Employment Hero Client ID
client_id.description: From your Employment Hero Developer Portal app.

client_secret.title: Employment Hero Client Secret
client_secret.description: From your Employment Hero Developer Portal app. Stored in your OS keychain.

scopes.title: Read-only scopes (space-separated)
scopes.description: Must match the read scopes ticked on your EH app. Leave as default unless your app differs.

redirect_port.title: Sign-in callback port
redirect_port.description: Local port used during browser sign-in. Must match the redirect URI registered on your EH app (default 8765).
